n: Book 3, Chapter 7: The Breaking of Arnor

steps.t: Malenfang is at Scurloc Farm, waiting to hear what you learned from the papers you deciphered.
Handarod is at Sírlond, across the river from Caranost, and he may know someone who might be able to tell you about the Grey Fear.
Narndir kept his journals at a secret place in the South Downs, but Handarod was trusted with its location. The hiding spot is beneath one of the east…
Narndir's journal describes the throne room of Caranost, located at the highest point of the ruined city. You should travel to the location described …
Narndir's writing is so evocative you can almost imagine King Tarondor II is present in the throne room he established at Caranost following the break…
Narndir's journal contains an account of the Battle of the Deadmount, and describes a clear path on the northern side of the hill that permits travell…
Narndir's writing has brought important figures of Cardolan's past to your imagination at the site of the Battle of the Deadmount, Amon Firn.
Narndir's writing has brought important figures of Cardolan's past to your imagination at the site of the Battle of the Deadmount, Amon Firn.
Narndir's journal describes a location in the south-eastern reaches of Tyrn Gorthad. You should travel to the location described by the journal, and r…
Narndir's writing speaks of terrible deeds done by forces of great evil among the barrows of Tyrn Gorthad.
Narndir's writing speaks of terrible deeds done by forces of great evil among the barrows of Tyrn Gorthad.
Meneldir stands nearby, gazing out at the barrows of Tyrn Gorthad.
